property.name: cookieHeading
property.description: Enter the title of the page here. E.g. Cookies on GOVUK

property.name: cookieDescription
property.description: Please provide a description of the cookies

property.name: showCookiesTable
property.description: Toggle to enable a table with relevant cookies that are captured

property.name: cookieTableRowNames
property.description: For each defined row in the table input the name of the cookie followed by a semicolon, e.g. cookieName1;cookieName2

property.name: cookieTableRowPurposes
property.description: For each defined row in the table input a purpose for the cookie followed by a semicolon, e.g. cookiePurpose1;cookiePurpose2

property.name: cookieTableRowExpires
property.description: For each defined row in the table input a expiry time followed by a semicolon, e.g. 20 hours;1 day

property.name: cookieSectionHeading
property.description: For the cookie sections please input a heading, e.g. Change your cookie Settings

property.name: sectionNames
property.description: For each defined section input a section name followed by a semicolon, e.g. Section1;Section2

property.name: sectionsContent
property.description: For each defined section input any text you would like to show followed by a semicolon, e.g. Section1Content;Section2Content

property.name: sectionsCategories
property.description: For each defined section input a cookie category separated by a semicolon to indicate if it is a necessary cookie, analytical or marketing, e.g. necessary;analytics;marketing

property.name: successText
property.description: Text to show in the success banner of the cookie page when the cookie settings have been saved
